question: For the quarterly platform engagement distribution, which interpretation best reflects what can (and cannot) be inferred from the 100% stacked bar chart?

options.A: The sum of all metrics indicates overall engagement volume trends across the year.
options.B: Q3 has the highest absolute number of support tickets because it has the largest support ticket share.
options.C: Valid inferences include within-quarter ranking comparisons. Invalid inferences include cross-quarter absolute quantity comparisons.
options.D: User registrations represent the smallest share in every quarter.

explanation: 100% stacking normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. Valid inferences include within-quarter ranking (e.g., one metric > another in every quarter). Invalid inferences include cross-quarter total comparisons or combining unrelated categories.
